# Borrow-from-LEFT setup — before. Order m=3.
#
# Removing 80 empties the rightmost leaf ch under c. Its only candidate lender
# is the LEFT sibling cg=[55,60] (the right side does not exist), so the borrow
# must come from the left. Exercises borrowFromLeft().
#
#                       [30]                        a (root)
#                     /      \
#               [10,20]       [50,70]               b        c
#              /   |   \      /   |    \
#           [5] [15] [25] [40] [55,60] [80]         leaves
root 1
1  1  2  30 3
2  2  4  10 5  20 6
3  2  7  50 8  70 9
4  1  0  5 0
5  1  0  15 0
6  1  0  25 0
7  1  0  40 0
8  2  0  55 0  60 0
9  1  0  80 0
